name: code-input
description: One-time password input block with auto-focus and paste support.

props.name: onChangeText
props.description: Called whenever the OTP value changes as the user types.

props.name: length
props.description: Number of OTP digit boxes to display.

props.name: onComplete
props.description: Called once when the user has filled all digit boxes with a complete OTP.

props.name: error
props.description: Error message displayed below the input; also activates the error border colour on all boxes.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables all OTP boxes, preventing user input.

examples.label: Example 1
examples.code:
<CodeInput
  length={6}
  value={otp}
  onChangeText={setOtp}
  onComplete={(code) => verifyCode(code)}
  error={otpError}
/>
